fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this message exchange between Accounts and Investments departments

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: The date and time when this message was generated

fields.name: fromDepartment
fields.description: The originating department sending the cash balance update

fields.name: toDepartment
fields.description: The receiving department consuming the cash balance update for fund allocation and risk assessment

fields.name: subject
fields.description: The subject line describing the purpose of the message

fields.name: accountNumber
fields.description: The unique account identifier for which the cash balance is being reported

fields.name: currency
fields.description: The currency code in which all monetary amounts in this message are denominated

fields.name: availableCashBalance
fields.description: The total available cash balance for the account, calculated as cleared cash plus pending deposits minus pending withdrawals

fields.name: asOfDate
fields.description: The date as of which the cash balance figures are current and valid

fields.name: details
fields.description: Breakdown of the available cash balance into its constituent components

children.name: clearedCash
children.description: Cash that has fully cleared and is immediately available for use

children.name: pendingDeposits
children.description: Cash from deposits that have been received but are not yet fully cleared

children.name: pendingWithdrawals
children.description: Cash committed to withdrawals that are in process but not yet completed

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional guidance or context for the Investments department regarding use of the cash balance data
